title: Ludwigia laruotteana
taxonomy: Ludwigia laruotteana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Onagraceae. This plant belongs to the genus Ludwigia, which comprises approximately 100 species of aquatic plants. Ludwigia laruotteana is native to South America, where it can be found growing in the wild. The classification of Ludwigia laruotteana is further categorized under the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, and order Myrtales.
